## Overview

AlphaPorno Downloader is a browser extension that lets you save videos from AlphaPorno.com directly to your computer. Just play a video, click the download button, and choose your quality. Videos are saved as standard MP4 files — no extra software needed. 3 free downloads included.

## Why It Exists

Purpose-built for AlphaPorno with automatic video detection, in-page download button, and HLS-to-MP4 conversion. Downloads happen entirely in your browser — no external tools, no command line, no hassle.

## Offline use cases

- Save a video from AlphaPorno for offline viewing
- Download in your preferred quality (360p–1080p)
- Build a personal library of saved content
- Download without dealing with HLS streams or technical tools
- Use the in-page button for instant downloads without opening the popup

## FAQ

### How do I download a video?

Go to any video page on AlphaPorno.com and press play. Then either click the download button that appears on the player, or click the extension icon in your toolbar. Select your preferred quality and hit download.

### What quality options are available?

The extension offers whatever qualities the source video provides — typically 360p, 480p, 720p, and sometimes 1080p. It auto-detects available resolutions.

### What format are downloaded videos?

All videos are saved as standard MP4 files that play on any device or media player.

### Where are my downloads saved?

Videos are automatically saved to a AlphaPorno subfolder inside your browser's default Downloads directory.

### How many free downloads do I get?

You get 3 free trial downloads after signing in with your email. After that, purchase a license for unlimited downloads.

### Does this work on Firefox?

Yes — supports Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Whale, Yandex, and Firefox.

### Why isn't the extension finding my video?

Make sure you've pressed play on the video first. The extension needs the stream to start before it can detect it. If issues persist, try refreshing the page.

### Is my data safe?

Yes. Video processing happens entirely in your browser — nothing is uploaded. Authentication uses secure OTP (one-time password) — no passwords stored.
description: Download videos from AlphaPorno.com. Auto-detects streams, converts HLS to MP4. Choose quality. 3 free downloads included.
name: AlphaPorno Downloader

## Overview

BongaCams Downloader is a browser extension that records live streams and downloads VOD recordings from BongaCams.com. Open a model's page, pick your quality, and hit Start to capture the live stream or download a recording as MP4. Handles LL-HLS, Mouflon DRM decryption, and VR streams. No extra software needed. 3 free downloads included.

## Why It Exists

Purpose-built for BongaCams with AMF API integration, multi-CDN HLS probing (doppiocdn, stripcdn, sc-cdn), Mouflon DRM decryption, low-latency live capture, VR metadata support, and automatic HLS-to-MP4 conversion. Everything happens in your browser — no external tools required.

## Offline use cases

- Record a live BongaCams stream in real time
- Download a BongaCams VOD recording
- Capture in your preferred quality (up to 1080p)
- Download VR streams with proper stereoscopic metadata
- Use the in-page player button for one-click capture without the popup
- Right-click any stream to start recording via context menu

## FAQ

### How do I record a live stream?

Go to any model page on BongaCams.com while the stream is live. Click the download button on the player or the extension icon. Select your quality and click Start. The extension records in real time. Click Stop when you're done — the recording saves as MP4.

### How do I download a VOD recording?

Navigate to a model's Videos page on BongaCams and select a recording. Click the extension icon, choose your quality, and hit Download. The recording saves as MP4.

### What quality options are available?

The extension detects all available qualities from the HLS master manifest — typically multiple resolutions up to 1080p. Formats are sorted by quality (highest first).

### What format are downloaded videos?

All videos are saved as standard MP4 files that play on any device or media player.

### Where are my downloads saved?

Videos automatically save to a BONGACAMS subfolder inside your browser's default Downloads directory.

### How many free downloads do I get?

3 free trial captures after signing in with your email. Purchase a license for unlimited captures.

Yes — supports Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Whale, Yandex, and Firefox.

### Why isn't the extension finding the stream?

Make sure the model is currently live. If the model is offline or in a private show, the extension will display a status message. Refresh the page if issues persist.

### Does this support VR streams?

Yes. The extension detects VR streams and preserves stereoscopic metadata (stereoPacking, frameFormat, horizontalAngle) in the filename.

### Is my data safe?

Yes. All stream processing happens entirely in your browser. Authentication uses secure OTP — no passwords stored.

## Overview

Cam4 Downloader is a browser extension that records live streams and downloads recorded videos from Cam4.com. Open a model's page, click Start to capture the live stream, or pick a recorded video and download it as MP4. Choose your quality, and it saves directly to your computer. No extra software needed. 3 free downloads included.

## Why It Exists

Purpose-built for Cam4 with live stream capture, VOD downloading, HLS-to-MP4 conversion, and Mouflon DRM handling. Multi-CDN probing across six edge servers ensures reliable stream detection. In-page download button and real-time capture progress. Everything happens in your browser.

## Offline use cases

- Capture a Cam4 live stream in real time
- Download recorded Cam4 videos (VOD) as MP4
- Choose your preferred quality from available HLS variants
- Use the in-page player button for one-click capture without the popup
- Right-click any stream to capture via context menu

## FAQ

### How do I capture a live stream?

Go to any model's page on Cam4.com while they are live. Click the Start button on the player or in the extension popup. The extension begins recording HLS segments in real time. Click Stop when you want to end the capture — the stream saves as MP4.

### Can I download recorded videos too?

Yes. Navigate to a model's video page (/\{model\}/videos/\{id\}) and the extension detects the VOD content. Select quality and download — it saves as MP4.

### What quality options are available?

The extension parses the HLS master manifest and shows all available resolution variants — typically ranging from 360p to 1080p, some with frame rate labels (e.g. 720p @ 60fps). Quality is sorted highest first.

### What format are downloaded videos?

All captures and downloads are saved as standard MP4 files that play on any device or media player.

### Where are my downloads saved?

Videos automatically save to a CAM4 subfolder inside your browser's default Downloads directory.

### How many free downloads do I get?

3 free trial downloads after signing in with your email. Purchase a license for unlimited captures and downloads.

### Does this work on Firefox?

Yes — supports Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Whale, Yandex, and Firefox.

### Why does the extension say the model is offline?

The model must be actively streaming for live capture to work. If they are offline or in a private show, the extension will display a status message. Wait for the public stream to resume.

### What is Mouflon DRM?

Mouflon is an HLS manifest obfuscation system that encrypts segment filenames. The extension handles this automatically — no action required from you.

### Is my data safe?

Yes. All stream processing and capture happens entirely in your browser. Authentication uses secure OTP — no passwords stored.
description: Download Cam4 live streams and recorded videos. Captures LL-HLS streams, converts to MP4. Choose quality. 3 free downloads included.
name: Cam4 Downloader

## Overview

Coomer Downloader is a browser extension that saves all media from Coomer.su creator pages. It scans visible posts, extracts videos, images, GIFs, and text content, and downloads everything to organized folders on your computer. No extra software needed. 3 free downloads included.

## Why It Exists

Purpose-built for Coomer.su with API-based post scanning that extracts every media type — videos, images, GIFs, and full text posts. Bulk download all visible content from a creator page, organized into per-creator folders with date-prefixed filenames. Everything happens in your browser — no external tools required.

## Offline use cases

- Save all media from a creator's page on Coomer.su for offline viewing
- Download individual videos, images, or GIFs from specific posts
- Save text posts as formatted documents
- Bulk download all visible content with one click
- Build an organized personal media library sorted by creator

## FAQ

### What types of content can I download?

Videos (MP4, WebM, MOV, etc.), images (JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF), GIFs, and text posts. The extension detects all media attached to Coomer posts.

### How does it find content?

The extension uses the Coomer API to scan posts programmatically. It extracts all attachments, file references, and text content from each post.

### Can I download from a creator's entire page?

Yes. On a creator page, the extension scans all visible posts (up to 60) and presents all media across tabs. Click Download Visible to bulk download.

### Where are my downloads saved?

All files save to a Coomer Downloader/\{creator name\}/\{date - title\} folder structure inside your browser's default Downloads directory.

### Which Coomer domains are supported?

coomer.su (primary), coomer.st, and coomer.party. The extension works across all three domains.

### How many free downloads do I get?

3 free trial downloads after signing in with your email. Purchase a license for unlimited downloads.

### Does this work on Firefox?

Yes — supports Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Whale, Yandex, and Firefox.

### Are text posts really saved?

Yes. Text content from posts is stripped of HTML, formatted with a title and metadata header, and saved as a .txt file in the creator's folder.

### Is my data safe?

Yes. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Authentication uses secure OTP — no passwords stored.
description: Download videos, images, GIFs, and text from Coomer.su. Bulk save creator content. Organized folders. 3 free downloads included.

## Overview

OnlyFans Bulk Downloader is a browser extension that batch-downloads photos, videos, and chat media from your OnlyFans subscriptions. Select the creators you subscribe to, choose your media type, and the extension downloads everything to your computer — organized, rate-limited, and queue-managed. No external software needed.

## Why It Exists

Purpose-built for OnlyFans with multi-creator bulk download, configurable rate limiting (conservative to aggressive), persistent download queue with pause/resume/retry, in-page download buttons on every image and video, chat media support, and media type filtering. Everything runs in your browser with smart rate limiting to protect your account.

## Offline use cases

- Bulk download all photos and videos from one or more OnlyFans creators you subscribe to
- Download only photos or only videos with the media type filter
- Save chat/DM media from conversations
- Use in-page overlay buttons for quick one-off downloads while browsing
- Manage large download queues with pause, resume, and retry
- Control download speed to avoid triggering platform rate limits

## FAQ

### How does bulk downloading work?

After setup, select one or more creators from your OnlyFans subscriptions. The extension fetches their posts via the OnlyFans API, extracts all media URLs (photos and videos), and queues them for download. The queue processes files with your chosen rate limit preset.

### Will this get my OnlyFans account banned?

The extension includes three rate limiter presets specifically designed to reduce risk. The Conservative preset (20-30 files/min) is the safest. We recommend using the Balanced preset (40-50 files/min) as a starting point. The extension also includes random timing jitter to simulate human-like behavior.

### Can I download from any OnlyFans creator?

You can only download from creators you are actively subscribed to. The extension uses your existing OnlyFans session and only accesses content your account has permission to view.

### What media types can I download?

Photos (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, AVIF) and videos (MP4, MOV, WebM, and more). You can filter to download only photos, only videos, or all media.

### Can I download chat/DM media?

Yes. The extension includes dedicated chat selection and chat list pages for browsing and downloading media from your OnlyFans conversations.

### Where are my downloads saved?

All files automatically save to an OnlyFans subfolder inside your browser's default Downloads directory.

### Can I pause and resume downloads?

Yes. The download queue supports pause, resume, stop, cancel all, clear finished, and retry cancelled operations. You can also adjust concurrency (1-8 simultaneous downloads) while the queue is running.

### What are the download speed presets?

Conservative (2-3s delay, 25 req/min — safest), Balanced (1-1.5s delay, 45 req/min — recommended), Aggressive (0.5-1s delay, 70 req/min — fastest but riskiest).

### Does this work on Firefox?

Yes — supports Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Whale, Yandex, and Firefox.

### Is my data safe?

Yes. All downloads happen directly between your browser and the OnlyFans CDN. Extension authentication uses secure OTP — no OnlyFans password is accessed or stored.
description: Bulk download photos and videos from OnlyFans creators. Rate-limited queue. Chat media. In-page buttons. Free trial included.
name: OnlyFans Bulk Downloader

## Overview

XHamsterLive Downloader is a browser extension that records live streams and downloads recordings from XHamsterLive.com. Open a model's page, click Start to capture the live stream, or download a saved recording. Handles LL-HLS live capture, VOD downloads, and VR streams. Saves as MP4. No external software. 3 free downloads included.

## Why It Exists

Purpose-built for XHamsterLive with real-time live stream capture, VOD recording downloads, and VR support. Extracts stream metadata from the site's internal state, discovers CDN hosts automatically, decodes obfuscated stream URIs, and converts HLS to MP4 in your browser. Start/stop live recording with one click.

## Offline use cases

- Capture a live stream from XHamsterLive in real time
- Download a saved recording (VOD) from a model's profile
- Record VR live streams with proper metadata in the filename
- Use the in-page player button for one-click capture without the popup
- Right-click any stream page to start a download via context menu

## FAQ

### How do I capture a live stream?

Go to a model's page on XHamsterLive.com while they're live. Click the extension icon or the player download button, select quality, and click Start. Click Stop when you want to end the recording. The captured stream saves as MP4.

### How do I download a saved recording (VOD)?

Navigate to a model's video recording page (the URL contains /videos/). Open the extension, select quality, and click Download. The recording saves as MP4.

### Does this work with VR streams?

Yes. The extension detects VR streams automatically and includes VR metadata (stereoPacking, frameFormat, angle) in the filename. A VR badge appears in the popup for VR content.

### What quality options are available?

The extension detects all available quality levels from the HLS master playlist. For live streams, qualities vary by the model's broadcast settings. Formats are sorted by resolution (highest first).

### What format are downloaded videos?

All videos — live captures, VOD recordings, and VR streams — are saved as standard MP4 files that play on any device or media player.

### Where are my downloads saved?

Videos automatically save to an XHamsterLive subfolder inside your browser's default Downloads directory.

### How many free downloads do I get?

3 free trial downloads after signing in with your email. Purchase a license for unlimited downloads.

### Does this work on Firefox?

Yes — supports Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Whale, Yandex, and Firefox.

### What if the model is offline or in a private show?

The extension will show a status message. Live capture only works when the model is streaming publicly. Saved VOD recordings can be downloaded anytime.

### Is my data safe?

Yes. All stream processing and HLS-to-MP4 conversion happens entirely in your browser. Authentication uses secure OTP — no passwords stored.
